items.name: iPhone 15 Pro
items.note: Mostly so I can test our product with VoiceOver without booking a lab.

items.name: Leuchtturm1917 A5 dotted
items.note: Three a year. I write the date on the spine; I keep the old ones.

items.name: Uni-ball Signo 0.38
items.note: The only pen I buy in bulk.

items.name: MacBook Pro 14" M3
items.note: On this since March 2024. The fan has run once.

items.name: HHKB Professional Hybrid
items.note: I have tried keyboards. This is my keyboard.

items.name: Herman Miller Aeron, size B
items.note: Secondhand. A decade old. Has outlasted two companies.

items.name: Linear
items.note: For the work I do, which is mostly work about other people’s work.

items.name: Figma
items.note: Grudging. It is what it is.

items.name: iA Writer
items.note: For first drafts. The lack of features is the feature.

items.name: VoiceOver / NVDA / JAWS
items.note: Open somewhere on my desk at all times.

items.name: Obsidian
items.note: A second brain I have almost convinced to stay organised.

items.name: Kobo Libra 2
items.note: Escape route from Amazon. Fine. Not great.

items.name: AirPods Pro (2nd gen)
items.note: Transparency mode is the best accessibility feature Apple ships.
